title: dodonaea viscosa f. angustifolia
intro: Dodonaea viscosa f. angustifolia, a lesser-known subspecies of the Dodonaea viscosa plant, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia, with slender leaves and small yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Dodonaea viscosa f. angustifolia include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant may be used in traditional medicine to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
